samples.text: All apples are fruits. A carrot is a fruit. Is a carrot an apple?
Every member of apples is among fruits. A carrot is a fruit. Does it follow that a carrot is an apple?
All red apples are edible fruits. A carrot is an edible fruit. Is a carrot a red apple?
Being a fruit does not by itself make something an apple. A carrot is a fruit. Is a carrot an apple?
All apples are fruits. A carrot is a fruit. The meeting started at noon. Is a carrot an apple?
